basic_details.job_title: Nuapada District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III
basic_details.short_information: Nuapada District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website Nuapada District Court. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the Nuapada District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per relevant Act, Rules, Orders or instructions issued by the competent authority/Government.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from recognized Institute, Passed Odia at M.E. standard, Good character and sound health
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized Institute. Passed Odia at M.E. standard.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist & Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900-63,200/- (Level-4 of the Pay Matrix) Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500-81,100/- (Level-7 of the Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Written Examination Computer Science Test (Practical) Skill Test / Shorthand & Typewriting Test Viva-voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nuapada District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nuapada.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
